content:
# Stromatolites

**Summary**: Laminated structures formed by the binding and trapping of sediment by bacteria.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-bashri|Bashri, 2016]] identified stromatolites as a key indicator for environmental conditions.

- [[2024-muharrag|Muharrag, 2024]] Referenced in this thesis.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-bashri|Bashri, 2016]] Used to identify hydrodynamic systems in the Dam Formation.

- [[2024-muharrag|Muharrag, 2024]] Referenced in this thesis.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-bashri|Bashri, 2016]] Morphological classification into LLH, SS, SH, and combination forms.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Stromatolitic lithofacies were found in both upper shoreface and supratidal environments. ([[2016-bashri|Bashri, 2016, p. 117]])


- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2024-muharrag|Muharrag, 2024]])
